}return oS(o)?t(o,n,r+1):o}(r,e.current);void aq=aZ(.42,0,1,1),aJ=aZ(0,0,.58,1),a0=aZ(.42,0,.58,1),a1=t=>e=>e<=.5?t(2*e)/2:(2-t(2*(1-e)))/2,a2=t=>e=>1-t(1-e),a3=aZ(.33,1.53,.69,.99),a4=a2(a3),a5=a1(a4),a6=t=>(t*=2)<1?.5*a4(t):.5*(2-Math.pow(2,-10*(t-1))),a7=t=>1-Math.sin(Math.acos(t)),a8=a2(a7),a9=a1(a7),ct=t=>Array.isArray(t)&&"number"==typeof ca={decay:aQ,inertia:aQ,tween:ci,keyframes:ci,spring:aK};function cc(t){"string"==typeof t.type&&(t.type=ca[t.type])}class cu{constructor(){this.updateFinished()}get finished(){return this._finished}updateFinished(){this._finished=new Promise(t=>{this.resolve=t})}notifyFinished(){this.resolve()}then(t,e){return this.finished.then(t,e)}}let cl=t=>t/100;class ch extends cu{constructor(t){super(),this.state="idle",this.startTime=null,this.isStopped=!1,this.currentTime=0,this.holdTime=null,this.playbackSpeed=1,this.stop=()=>{let{motionValue:t}=this.options;t&&t.updatedAt!==sn.now()&&this.tick(sn.now()),this.isStopped=!0,"idle"!==this.state&&(this.teardown(),this.options.onStop?.())},aw.mainThread++,this.options=t,this.initAnimation(),this.play(),!1===t.autoplay&&this.pause()}initAnimation(){let{options:t}=this;cc(t);let{type:e=ci,repeat:n=0,repeatDelay:r=0,repeatType:i,velocity:o=0}=t,{keyframes:s}=t,a=e||ci;a!==ci&&"number"!=typeof s[0]&&(this.mixKeyframes=aA(cl,aM(s[0],s[1])),s=[0,100]);let c=a({...t,keyframes:s});"mirror"===i&&(this.mirroredGenerator=a({...t,keyframes:[...s].reverse(),velocity:-o})),null===c.calculatedDuration&&(c.calculatedDuration=aL(c));let{calculatedDuration:u}=c;this.calculatedDuration=u,this.resolvedDuration=u+r,this.totalDuration=this.resolvedDuration*(n+1)-r,this.generator=c}updateTime(t){let e=Math.round(
